Leather Jacket - 【Brutti Autumn/Winter Men's Sheepskin Jacket: A Calm Expression of Texture and Style】 The Brutti Autumn/Winter men's sheepskin jacket interprets the understated taste of contemporary gentlemen with exquisite craftsmanship. Carefully crafted from premium New Zealand imported suede sheepskin, the leather is delicate and soft, gradually revealing a warm luster with wear, cleverly blending natural texture with durability. Available in dual tones of orange and khaki, this collection maintains a steady tone for the autumn/winter season while breaking the monotony with just the right color tension, effortlessly suitable for various occasions. Following the concept of "simplicity is luxury" from the old money style, the design features clean and smooth lines, with no redundant decorations, only a single chest pocket as a finishing touch, showcasing a restrained sense of delicacy in the details. Whether paired with casual pants for a relaxed style or combined with dress pants for a light business look, the Brutti Autumn/Winter men's sheepskin jacket exudes a composed aura for the wearer. With high-quality materials and classic design, it is an ideal choice for showcasing the taste of mature gentlemen. Size -
